svg.title: Bearing Fault Diagnosis · CWRU Dataset · Full Pipeline Architecture
svg.desc: Full ML pipeline from raw CWRU .mat files through preprocessing, two parallel modeling branches, and shared training, evaluation, and inference outputs.
svg.text: Bearing Fault Diagnosis · CWRU Dataset · Full Pipeline Architecture
Preprocessing → Feature Extraction / DL Modeling → Training → Evaluation → Inference
Benchmarked against classical ML under shared splits
Controlled subset: DE only · 12 kHz only · 4 classes · 2048 window · Cross-load robustness
